name: High Number of Emails From Unauthorized Users
notes:
This rule triggers when an email that is not included in the whitelist sends numerous emails. This behaviour can reveal a tentative of massive infection. In most cases, only a limited number of entities are meant to send mass emailing.

Note: The "Whitelisted Email Admins" reference set must be populated with email addresses allowed to send large amount of emails at once.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Mail Receive
when any of Sender (custom) are contained in any of Whitelisted Email Admins - AlphaNumeric
when at least 100 events are seen with the same Sender (custom) in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 100 events are seen with the same Sender (custom) in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY High Number of Emails From Unauthorized Users on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Mail Receive
AND NOT when any of Sender (custom) are contained in any of Whitelisted Email Admins - AlphaNumeric
AND when at least 100 events are seen with the same Sender (custom) in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: High Number of Emails From Unauthorized Users
Event description: Detects when an email that is not a part of the whitelist sends numerous emails from within the organization.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Sender (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
